newEvidence.query: bulk listing management marketplace seller tools 2026
newEvidence.finding: 15 additional users in r/eBaySellers requesting bulk tools, multiple willing to pay $50+/mo
newEvidence.quote: Desperately need bulk relisting, would pay good money for it

newEvidence.finding: eBay added basic bulk edit in Feb 2026 but limited to 25 items at a time — still inadequate for power sellers
newEvidence.quote: The new bulk edit is a start but 25 items at a time when I have 500 listings is still painful

verifiedOpportunities.verificationSummary: Strong confirmation with additional WTP signals. eBay's partial fix actually validates the pain — their solution is inadequate.

newEvidence.query: price tracking reselling tools CamelCamelCamel alternative
newEvidence.finding: HN thread discussing price tracking APIs but no new dedicated tools found
newEvidence.quote: Someone should build this but the data acquisition cost is the barrier

verifiedOpportunities.verificationSummary: No significant new evidence. Opportunity remains valid but data acquisition cost is a noted barrier.

newEvidence.query: cross platform inventory sync reselling 2026 new tool
newEvidence.finding: Vendoo launched real-time sync in March 2026 with positive reviews
newEvidence.quote: Finally a tool that actually syncs in real-time across eBay, Mercari, and Poshmark

newEvidence.finding: Early reviews of Vendoo sync are mostly positive, some minor bugs reported
newEvidence.quote: Vendoo's new sync is game-changing, had one double-sell in 3 weeks vs daily before

verifiedOpportunities.verificationSummary: Vendoo's March 2026 real-time sync launch significantly narrows this gap. Opportunity weakened but not invalidated — Vendoo still has bugs.
